items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 107.9 mph at a 11.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 15, PHI 1. Tyler Tolbert led the night, 5-5 | HR, 2B, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 107.9 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Phillies Recap
